title: Adobe CJM ExperienceEvent - Custom Channel Execution Metrics
description: Per-call execution metrics for custom-channel deliveries. Populated only by MSW for custom-channel sends. Email/SMS/Push paths leave this block absent. See wiki 3886615741 for design rationale.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Endpoint
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Full URL of the custom-channel customer endpoint. Query parameters are stripped before storage to prevent PII/secrets in the dataset (matches CJM-124474 pattern). Null when the call was skipped before HTTP was attempted (errorCode set to AUTH_* / INTEGRATION_CACHE_IO / REQUEST_GENERATION_ERROR).

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: HTTP Method
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: HTTP method used for the call (POST, GET, PUT, etc.). Null when the call was skipped.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Request Timestamp
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Wall-clock timestamp (UTC) captured immediately before the customer-endpoint HTTP request is sent on the wire. Null when the call was skipped.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Response Time
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Server HTTP response time in milliseconds. Measured around the customer-endpoint HTTP exchange only - excludes auth latency, connection acquisition, throttle wait, and pool wait. Matches Custom Action XDM actionExecutionOriginTime semantics. For HTTP_TIMEOUT: equals the configured timeout duration. Null when the call was skipped.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: HTTP Status Code
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: HTTP response status code from the customer endpoint. Null when the call was skipped (no HTTP attempt) or timed out without a response.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Is Throttled
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Phase 1: config-enabled flag indicating whether throttling configuration was applied to this endpoint/channel at the time of dispatch. Does not indicate this specific call actually waited in a queue. Matches Custom Action XDM actionIsThrottled literal meaning.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Error Code
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Unified error envelope covering both skip-stage (auth/cache) and HTTP-stage (4xx/5xx/timeout) failures. Null on success. Controlled vocabulary: AUTH_CACHE_IO, AUTH_HTTP_ERROR, AUTH_TOKEN_PARSE, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, REQUEST_GENERATION_ERROR, HTTP_4XX, HTTP_5XX, HTTP_TIMEOUT, HTTP_PARSE_ERROR, NETWORK_ERROR. CAPPED and VALIDITY_EXPIRED are reserved for future producer support.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Error Reason
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Human-readable detail of the failure (exception message, parsed error body, etc.). Used for drilldown tooltips and debugging. Not intended for aggregation - use errorCode for grouping. Null on success.
